description: This file contains Data Transfer Object (DTO) definitions for loan application draft operations in a Spring Boot application, including request and response models with validation and Swagger annotations.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos
classes.description: A utility class containing nested records for creating, updating, patching, and responding with loan draft data.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos.CreateRequest
classes.description: DTO for creating a new loan draft, includes data, sectionStatus, and currentStep fields.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos.UpdateRequest
classes.description: DTO for fully updating a loan draft with data, sectionStatus, currentStep, status, and expectedVersion.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos.SectionPatchRequest
classes.description: DTO for patching a specific section of the draft, merging sectionData and optional sectionStatus, with concurrency control via expectedVersion.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos.DraftResponse
classes.description: DTO for returning a loan draft with metadata including id, userId, timestamps, status, risk score, decision info, etc.
